name: harness-starter-generic
author: octos
description: Minimal starter for a single-artifact harnessed custom app. Writes a text file under output/ and lets the workspace contract deliver it.

tools.name: produce_artifact
tools.description: Produce a single text artifact under output/. The workspace policy primary = "output/artifact-*.txt" resolves the delivered file.

label.description: Free-text label recorded inside the artifact; also used to derive the filename.
